Awesome Shell

A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php. This awesome collection is also available on Unix-Shell.ZEEF.com.

  • Shells
  • Command-Line Productivity
    • Directory Navigation
  • Customization
  • For Developers
  • System Utilities
  • Downloading and Serving
  • Multimedia and File Formats
  • Applications
  • Games
  • Shell Package Management
  • Shell Script Development
  • Guides
  • Awesome Zsh 
  • Awesome Fish
  • Other Awesome Lists

Shells

Choose your base shell.

  • bash - GNU Project's shell (Bourne Again SHell)
  • elvish - Friendly, expressive shell features like anonymous functions and data structures
  • es - The extensible shell, based on Plan 9's rcstars159 shell
  • fish - Smart and user-friendly command line shell
  • ionstars1.1k - A modern system shell that features a simple, yet powerful, syntax. It is written entirely in Rust.
  • ksh93stars366 - Korn Shell
  • mkshstars144 - MirBSD Korn Shell
  • ngsstars881 - Fully featured scripting language created specifically for Ops. REPL is being developed.
  • nushellstars11.2k - A modern shell written in Rust
  • okshstars160 - Portable OpenBSD ksh
  • osh - Bash compatible, with new/modern Unix shell language called Oil
  • pdksh - Public domain Korn shell
  • powershell a cross-platform task automation and configuration management framework, consisting of a command-line shell and scripting language
  • shell++stars80 - Friendly and modern functional and object oriented shell script language
  • shenvstars27 - Simple shell version management
  • tcsh - C shell with file name completion and command line editing
  • xonsh - Python-ish, BASHwards-looking shell language and command prompt
  • yash - A POSIX-compliant command line shell with built-in support for completion and prediction based on command history
  • zsh - Powerful shell with scripting language

Command-Line Productivity

Search, bookmarks, multiplexing, and other tools that make your terminal experience more productive.

  • AdvancedNewFilestars152 - Fast creation of files and directories in a recursive way. Inspired by the Vim plugin.
  • agstars21.9k - Super fast string search through a directory hierarchy
  • aliasesstars395 - Contextual, dynamic, organized aliases for bash
  • autoenvstars4.8k - Directory-based environments
  • bashhubstars876 - Bash history in the cloud. Indexed and searchable.
  • boilrstars1.3k - A blazingly fast CLI tool for creating projects from boilerplate templates.
  • boomstars1.2k - Store links and snippets in the command line
  • borgstars1.5k - A terminal based search engine for bash commands
  • browshstars13.2k - The modern text-based browser
  • Bukustars4.4k - Powerful command-line bookmark manager
  • byobu - Text-based window manager and terminal multiplexer
  • codstars307 — A completion daemon for shell that learns when you invoke --help commands
  • CloudClipstars59 - Your own clipboard in the cloud, copy and paste text with gist between different systems
  • ddgrstars2k - DuckDuckGo from the terminal
  • deskstars2.4k - A lightweight workspace manager for the shell
  • direnvstars7.4k - An environment switcher for the shell, compare with autoenv
  • dnotestars2.1k - A simple command line notebook with multi-device sync and web interface
  • eurekastars331 - CLI tool to input and store your ideas without leaving the terminal
  • fasdstars5.4k - Command-line productivity booster, offers quick access to files and directories
  • fdstars17.2k - A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to find.
  • foxystars28 - Plain text bookmarks for Firefox and surf browsers.
  • fselectstars2.9k - Find files with SQL-like queries.
  • funkystars439 - Extends functionality of shell functions making them more powerful and flexible.
  • fzstars368 - Seamless fuzzy tab completion for z
  • fzfstars36.6k - A command-line fuzzy finder
  • gitmuxstars197 - Show Git status in Tmux status bar
  • googlerstars5.1k - Google Search, Google Site Search, Google News from the terminal
  • googlrstars30 - Command line tool that lets you search Google from your terminal.
  • hasstars316 - has helps you check presence of various command line tools and their versions on path
  • how2stars5.4k - how2 finds the simplest way to do something in a unix shell. It's like man, but you can query it in natural language.
  • navistars9.1k - An interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line
  • hhighlighterstars373 - Colorize words in a command output
  • hrstars1.2k - <hr /> for your terminal
  • hssstars258 - An interactive parallel ssh client featuring autocomplete and asynchronous execution
  • hstrstars2.7k - Bash History Suggest Box
  • kstars1.5k - k is a Zsh script to make directory listings more readable, adding Git status, fileweight colors and rotting dates
  • k aliasstars16 - get kool aliases (and more) working with a simple one-liner
  • lf.shstars31 - Quickly search files with fewer typings and do many more (grepping, copying path to clipboard, etc)
  • Lmod - Lua-based Environment Modules that enhances Tcl-based modules while being backward compatible (compare to modules)
  • loopstars521 - Write and control complex loops with as one-liners
  • markerstars1.8k - Bookmark your shell commands
  • mackupstars11.1k - Keep your application settings in sync (OS X/Linux)
  • mcflystars2.1k - Fly through your shell history. Great Scot!
  • modules - Classical Tcl-based Environment Modules managing the shell environment (compare to Lmod, direnv, and autoenv)
  • nnnstars11.4k - File browser and disk usage analyzer with excellent desktop integration
  • parallel - Build and execute shell command lines from standard input in parallel
  • pass - Manage passwords from the command line with GPG encryption and optional git integration.
  • pathpickerstars4.6k - Accepts inputs like grep, searches, git etc; allows selecting files from the result of the input, which you can then open or provide as argument to a command.
  • pddstars220 - Tiny date, time diff calculator with timers
  • percolstars3k - Adds flavor of interactive filtering to the traditional pipe concept of UNIX shell
  • qstars46 - Vim like macro registers for your Bash and Zsh Shell
  • qfcstars508 - File-completion widget for Bash and Zsh
  • reshstars320 - Contextual shell history for Zsh and Bash
  • rgstars25k - ripgrep is a line oriented search tool that combines the usability of The Silver Searcher with the raw speed of GNU grep
  • screen - GNU terminal multiplexer
  • shell-historystars83 - Visualize your shell usage with Highcharts
  • SHMLstars412 - Style framework for the terminal (Shell Markup Language)
  • slugifystars266 - Command that converts filenames and directories to a web friendly format
  • smanstars228 - A command-line snippet manager
  • sparkstars5.7k - ▁▂▃▅▂▇ in your shell
  • spark.fishstars233 - ▁▂▃▅ Sparkline Generator
  • sheetstars243 - Text snippets for the command line
  • spotstars868 - Tiny file search utility
  • snipsstars48 - Command line tool to manage snippets of code.
  • sqllinestars423 - Shell for issuing SQL to relational databases via JDBC (multiline, completion, highlighting, dialect support)
  • sshfsstars872 - A tool for mounting remote file systems over SSH
  • sudocabularystars138 - Learn English Vocabulary from your terminal
  • surfraw - browse specific site and search the web from your terminal without browser.
  • task-managerstars10 - Execute all your scripts with just two or three keystrokes.
  • td-clistars126 - A todo command line manager to organize and manage your todos across multiple projects.
  • thefuckstars61.8k - Fix common shell mistakes by using an easy to remember command
  • tldrstars599 - A fully-functional bash client for tldr, simplified and community-driven man pages
  • tmux - Amazing terminal multiplexer
  • topaliasstars87 - bash/zsh aliases generator from command history with shell statistic
  • undollarstars75 - undollar bites the dollar sign off the tip of the command you just pasted into your terminal
  • usqlstars6.4k - Universal command-line interface for SQL databases.
  • vstars400 - z for vim.
  • wemuxstars3.4k - Multi-User Tmux Made Easy
  • xiki - Makes the shell console more friendly and powerful
  • xplrstars1.2k - A hackable, minimal, fast TUI file explorer
  • xsvstars7.1k - a fast CSV command line toolkit written in Rust
  • xxhstars1.6k - Bring your favorite shell wherever you go through the SSH.

Directory Navigation

  • aliasmestars95 - alias helper to change directory quickly
  • autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line
  • bashmarksstars1.6k - Directory bookmarks for the shell
  • bdstars850 - Quickly go back to a parent directory
  • commacdstars308 - A faster way to move around in Bash
  • enhancdstars1.9k - A next-generation cd command with an interactive filter
  • gotostars705 - A shell utility for navigation to aliased directories supporting auto-completion
  • jumpstars1.1k - Jump helps you navigate your file system faster by learning your habits.
  • lazy-cdstars20 - Simple bash commands for bookmarked navigation of the file system, complete with bash-completion.
  • upstars130 - Ascend directories by name or count; for bash, zsh, and fish.
  • zstars13.1k - z is the new j, yo
  • z.luastars2k - A new cd command that helps you navigate faster by learning your habits
  • zoxidestars2.4k - A faster way to navigate your filesystem, written in Rust
  • zpyistars83 - Python in Zsh - Easy python scripting in shell

Customization

Custom prompts, color themes, etc.

  • base16-builderstars365 - Base16-Builder
  • bash-full-of-colorsstars123 - Powerful prompt with screen, tmux, git support and many more
  • bash-git-promptstars6k - An informative and fancy Bash prompt for Git users
  • bash-powerlinestars799 - Powerline-style Bash prompt in pure Bash script
  • bashstrapstars1.6k - A quick way to spruce up OSX terminal
  • bullet-train-oh-my-zsh-themestars2.6k - An oh-my-zsh shell theme based on the Powerline Vim plugin
  • emojifystars1.4k Emoji on the command line
  • flatui-terminal-theme - Nicer colors for terminal
  • geometrystars778 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
  • git-promptstars328 - Bash prompt with Git, SVN and HG modules
  • gittifystars56 - A colorful Bash prompt + customized Git aliases
  • Gogh - Color Schemestars5.8k - Color Scheme for Gnome Terminal
  • liquidpromptstars4.1k - A full-featured & carefully designed adaptive prompt for Bash & Zsh
  • mysql-colorizestars86 - Colorization for mysql comand-line client
  • oh-my-gitstars3.4k - An opinionated git prompt for bash and zsh
  • polyglotstars121 - An informative Git prompt that works in bash, zsh, ksh, mksh, pdksh, dash, and busybox sh
  • powerlevel10kstars17.4k - Super flexible awesome powerline ZSH theme
  • sexy-bash-promptstars1.1k - Bash prompt with colors, Git statuses, and Git branches
  • starship - Fast, customisable, cross-shell prompt written in rust
  • synth-shellstars228 - Greeter with a customizable status report and a fancy bash prompt

For Developers

Command-line development, version control, and deployment.

  • ack - A grep-like search tool optimized for source code.
  • add-gitignorestars482 - Interactive CLI that generates a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
  • bcalstars335 - Byte CALculator for storage conversions and calculations
  • bitwisestars394 - Terminal based interactive bit manipulator in curses.
  • bockerstars8.1k - Docker implemented in 100 lines of bash
  • clocstars11.6k - Count Lines of Code
  • docltstars41 - A command line interface to Digital Ocean
  • dokkustars21.4k - Docker powered mini-Heroku. The smallest PaaS implementation you've ever seen.
  • getopts.fishstars169 - CLI parser for fish
  • forgitstars1.5k - Utility tool for git taking advantage of fuzzy finder fzf.
  • git-extra-commandsstars644 - Many Git extra utilities. Churn, cut-branch, improved-merge and many more.
  • git-extrasstars14.8k - Git utilities -- repo summary, repl, changelog population, author commit percentages and more
  • git-openstars2.5k - Type git open to open the GitHub page or website for a repository in your browser
  • git-quick-statsstars4.7k - Git quick statistics is a simple and efficient way to access various statistics in git repository.
  • git-semverstars317 - Git plugin for easing semantic versioning and changelog validation
  • git-shstars716 - A customized Bash environment suitable for Git work
  • hubstars20.9k - hub helps you win at git.
  • juststars2.8k - Task runner for saving and running project-specific commands.
  • licinsstars19 - Insert commented software licenses into source code.
  • mkdkrstars234 - Makefile + Docker = CI Pipeline
  • mr - Multiple Repository management tool
  • overcommitstars3.4k - A fully configurable and extendable Git hook manager
  • pre-commit - A framework for managing and maintaining multi-language pre-commit hooks
  • reboundstars3.5k - Instantly browse Stack Overflow results in your terminal when you get a compiler error
  • reprenstars278 - Command-line search-and-replace and file-renaming swiss army knife
  • slapstars6k - Sublime-like terminal-based text editor that runs on Node.js
  • shipitstars532 - Minimalistic SSH deployment
  • starringstars156 - Automatically star the npm-packages that you are using on GitHub.
  • tagstars563 - Instantly jump to your ag matches.
  • wipe-modulesstars312 - A little agent that removes the node_modules folder of non-active projects

System Utilities

OS-related tools, including system administration, system debugging, and file and process management.

  • atop - ASCII full-screen performance monitor that is capable of reporting the activity of all processes
  • batstars26.9k - A cat clone with wings
  • bmonstars816 - Real-time network bandwidth monitor and rate estimator with human-friendly visual output
  • bpytopstars6.7k - Linux/OSX/FreeBSD resource monitor
  • catclistars92 - The command line catalog tool for your offline data
  • ccatstars2.9k - ccat is the colorizing cat. It works similar to cat but displays content with syntax highlighting.
  • exastars13.2k - A modern version of ls.
  • progressstars5.4k - Linux tool to show progress for cp, rm, dd, and more...
  • strongholdstars832 - Easily configure MacOS security settings from the terminal.
  • glancesstars18.3k - Glances an Eye on your system
  • goaccessstars13.2k - GoAccess is a real-time web log analyzer and interactive viewer that runs in a terminal in *nix systems.
  • hblockstars759 - Hosts-file based adblocker
  • histstatstars81 - History for netstat
  • htopstars5.5k - A ncurses based interactive process viewer which aims to be a better top
  • lnav - An advanced log file viewer for the small-scale
  • logdissectstars90 - CLI utility and Python API for analyzing log files and other data.
  • ls++stars463 - Colorized ls on steroids
  • lspstars502 - An improved ls, with file descriptions in plain language and intelligent file grouping
  • mazastars1.5k - Local ad blocker. Like Pi-hole but local and using your operating system.
  • mtrstars1.7k - The functionality of the 'traceroute' and 'ping' programs in a single network diagnostic tool.
  • ncdu - NCurses Disk Usage
  • nmtuistars185 - Text User Interface for controlling NetworkManager
  • powertopstars492 - Battery/Power usage and device stats monitoring command-line tool, with tune-up options.
  • prettypingstars954 - Making the output of ping prettier, more colorful, more compact, and easier to read.
  • procdogstars70 - Lightweight command-line control of long-lived processes like servers
  • quick-securestars380 - Quickly secure and harden UNIX/Linux systems
  • rngstars18 - Copy range of lines from file or stdin to stdout.
  • wifi-wandstars56 - a Ruby command line application for managing WiFi on MacOS (install by gem install wifi-wand)
  • xiringuitostars979 - SSH-based "VPN for poors"

Downloading and Serving

Self-hosted, lightweight servers and networking tools written in shell scripts.

  • aria2stars22.8k - aria2 is a lightweight multi-protocol & multi-source, cross platform download utility operated in command-line. It supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, BitTorrent and Metalink
  • ballsstars807 - Bash on Balls
  • bashttpdstars1.3k - A web server written in Bash
  • bashhub-serverstars193 - Private cloud shell history. Open source server for bashhub
  • bitpocketstars991 - "DIY Dropbox" or "2-way directory (r)sync with proper deletion"
  • Dropbox-Uploaderstars6.2k - Dropbox Uploader is a Bash script which can be used to upload, download, list or delete files from Dropbox
  • httpiestars50.7k - HTTPie is a command line HTTP client, a user-friendly cURL replacement
  • HTTPLabstars3.7k - The interactive web server, let you inspect HTTP requests and forge responses.
  • ngincatstars157 - Tiny Bash HTTP server using netcat
  • restystars2.6k - Little command line REST client that you can use in pipelines
  • shell2httpstars755 - HTTP-server to execute shell commands. Designed for development, prototyping or remote control
  • vesperstars181 - 🍸Vesper is a HTTP framework for Bash/Unix Shell
  • youtube-dl - Small command-line program to download videos from YouTube.com and other video sites

Multimedia and File Formats

Tools for handling video and audio files.

  • adb-exportstars80 - Export Android content providers to CSV format
  • Android-Kitchenstars918 - A text-based kitchen for Android ROM customization. Uses shell scripts and works with Cygwin/OS X/Linux
  • Beetsstars10.1k - Music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger
  • cmusstars4.2k - Cross-platform cli audio player.
  • daselstars891 - Query and update data structures using selectors from the command line. Comparable to jqstars19.4k / yqstars1.5k but supports JSON, YAML, TOML and XML with zero runtime dependencies.
  • fxstars10.7k - Command-line JSON processing tool by anononymus JavaScript functions
  • gifgenstars403 - Simple high quality GIF encoding
  • image-scraperstars639 - A cool command line image scraper with a lot of features.
  • imgpstars773 - Blazing fast batch image resizer and rotator
  • jostars3.1k - A small utility to create JSON objects from command-line arguments.
  • jqstars19.4k - Sed for json data. You can use it to slice and filter and map and transform structured data
  • korkutstars320 - Quick and simple image processing at the command line.
  • mpv - Lets you play most audio and video formats (using ASCII characters) in the shell as well as in a GUI.
  • nehmstars83 - Console tool, which downloads, sets IDv3 tags and adds to your iTunes (if you use it) your SoundCloud likes in convenient way
  • PiCASTstars1.7k - PiCAST turns your $35 Raspberry Pi in to a Chromecast like Device
  • sejdastars343 - Command line manipulation of PDF documents (split, merge, rotate, convert to jpg, extract text, etc)
  • visidatastars3.8k - A terminal spreadsheet multitool for exploring and arranging data (csv/json/xml/xls/yaml/etc)
  • xidelstars352 - Cli tool to filter, map and create HTML/XML/JSON data with (Turing-complete) XPath and XQuery.
  • xmlstarlet - Old but powerful tool for command-line XML formatting, filtering, and manipulation.
  • yqstars3.9k - yq is a portable command-line YAML processor

Command line-based applications or command line access to existing services.

Games

All work and no play is a cruddy way to spend your day.

  • bash2048stars811 - Bash implementation of 2048 game

Tools for managing multiple shell configurations. For zsh-specific tools, see the Zsh section.

  • bash-itstars12.3k - A community Bash framework

Shell Script Development

Tools for writing, improving, or organizing Bash or other shell scripts

  • ansistars345 - ANSI escape codes in pure bash - change text color, position the cursor, much more
  • assert.shstars436 - Bash unit testing framework
  • bashewstars60 - bash script creator - from small stand-alone script to complex projects with CI/CD and testing
  • bashfulstars509 - A collection of libraries to simplify writing Bash scripts
  • Bashletsstars59 - A modular extensible toolbox for Bash
  • bashmanagerstars78 - mini bash framework for creating command line tools
  • bashwithnailsstars25 - a Bash framework written just for fun with testing, dependency management & packaging
  • bash-language-serverstars1k - LSP-based Bash language server
  • batsstars2.4k - Bash Automated Testing System
  • crashstars42 - Proper error handling, exceptions and try/catch for ZSH
  • critic.shstars439 - Dead simple testing framework for Bash with coverage reporting
  • eshstars109 - A simple templating engine based on shell, implemented in ~290 lines of POSIX shell and awk.
  • Fishtapestars286 - TAP producer and test harness for fish
  • composurestars272 - Compose, document, version and organize your shell functions
  • dispatch - A command line argument parser in 50 lines of portable shell script.
  • getoptionsstars93 - An elegant option parser for shell scripts (sh, bash and all POSIX shells)

  • lumberjackstars33 - A logging interface for shell scripts
  • mostars386 - Mustache templates in pure bash
  • optparsestars131 - A BASH wrapper for getopts, for simple command line arguments.
  • rerunstars400 - A modular shell automation framework to organize your keeper scripts
  • revolverstars114 - A reusable progress spinner for shell scripts
  • phasesstars9 - Minimally invasive bash preprocessor, select sections of your script to run
  • powscriptstars98 - bash transpiler written in bash (coffeescript for bash)
  • semver_bashstars202 - Semantic Versioning in Bash
  • sh-semverstars24 - Semver tool for bash - finds versions matching to specified rules
  • shellcheckstars24.7k - Static analysis tool for shell scripts
  • shellfirestars1.2k - A repository of namespaced, composable shell (bash, sh and dash) function libraries
  • shellspecstars421 - A full-featured BDD unit testing framework for dash, bash, ksh, zsh and all POSIX shells
  • shfmtstars3.7k - A shell parser, formatter, and interpreter with bash support; includes shfmt
  • shpecstars350 - A shell testing framework
  • shutit - Automation framework based on bash and pexpect
  • substars1.6k - A delicious way to organize programs
  • tsstars49 - A shell test script
  • urchinstars194 - An idiomatic shell testing framework that uses only shell commands
  • shunit2stars1.1k - A unit test framework for Bash scripts with a flavour of JUnit/PyUnit.
  • rebashstars55 - Scripting library/framework. Features: imports, exceptions, doc-tests ...
  • zunitstars140 - A powerful unit testing framework for ZSH

Guides

  • Bash Official Reference Manual
